scoring.notes: Optional case (required: false) — uses weighted total >= 0.5 to pass. routingCorrectness: `shuttle-client-frontend` as primary target scores 1.0 (exact-category-match); generic `shuttle` scores 0.4 (generic-shuttle-fallback, partial credit). When a scorer is present, qualitative dimensions from the scorer contribute to the weighted total; qualitative threshold does not apply to optional cases. The scorer should assess whether the model explains that more-specific patterns take precedence (longer, narrower glob wins). A response that routes without any rationale about the overlap will receive lower qualitative scores.
